title: 有馬記念の後に・ずっと、ずーっと

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara returns, gasping for breath. In an
amazing display of running, she took home
victory in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Friends and rivals alike praise her to the high
heavens, and Haru Urara is over the moon with
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's Arima Kinen journey comes to a
close. She successfully reached her dream race...
and won!
